description: The VP of Engineering has approved a critical hire for the DevOps team. A complete hiring directive has been placed at /home/ga/Desktop/devops_hiring_directive.txt. Execute the full recruitment-to-onboarding pipeline in OrangeHRM (login: admin / Admin@OHrm2024!) as specified in the directive — from creating the job vacancy and adding candidates, through shortlisting, interviews, and final hiring decisions (offer and rejection), to completing the hired employee's full onboarding including job title, department, work contact details, emergency contact, pay grade with salary, leave entitlements for the current year, and a probationary performance review. All names, dates, values, and specific details are provided in the directive file.
